ship.template:
Implement this task end-to-end: $ARGUMENTS

Plan first, delegate complex decisions to Senior DEV, delegate implementation to Mid DEV. Verify results.

code.template:
Implement this: $ARGUMENTS

Write code, run tests, verify. Keep changes focused.

senior.description: Code review, architecture, or complex decisions by Senior DEV
senior.template:
Review or handle this complex task: $ARGUMENTS

Provide thorough analysis. Delegate implementation subtasks to Mid DEV if needed.

plan.description: Get a plan from CTO without implementing
plan.template:
Create a plan for this, but do NOT implement: $ARGUMENTS

Break down into subtasks, assign to Senior DEV or Mid DEV, estimate complexity, identify risks. Stop after planning.
